text.headline: Career Snapshot
text.text: From statistics olympiads to production ML and real-time IoT.

media.caption: A dream for a Young Statistician (SAGE AI)

text.headline: SAGE AI — Data Analyst / Co-founder
text.text: A young data-science team for product bundling and demand forecasting.

text.headline: Business Data Analyst — Digikala
text.text: The largest e-commerce platform in the Middle East. Automated vendor segmentation, delivered 10 Power BI dashboards, and deployed a churn model retaining 10,000+ customers (~$8,000/month savings).

text.headline: ML Engineer / Big Data Scientist — Snappfood
text.text: Iran's first online food-ordering platform. Built 10+ ML pipelines and MLOps automation (GitLab CI, Docker Swarm, MLflow), cut model time-to-production ~30%, and powered 60+ experiments on a Hadoop/Spark warehouse.

text.headline: Data Scientist & ML Engineer — RoomVU
text.text: AI-curated video marketing for 130,000+ real-estate agents. Shipped NER, RAG (98% factual accuracy), NLP summarization, voice cloning on AWS SageMaker, and ChatGPT agents saving 20+ hours/week.

text.headline: Mentor & Course Owner — Great Learning
text.text: Owns data-science and ML programs (AI in Healthcare; Data-Driven Decisions) and mentors practitioners on end-to-end deep learning and NLP projects.

text.headline: Industrial IoT Predictive Maintenance — SensesIQ
text.text: Real-time platform ingesting 40+ industrial machines via Kafka. A temporal convolutional autoencoder detects anomalies in real time (prevented 100+ critical failures) with sub-5-second Telegram alarming.
